name: varro
description: SQL, persistent Jupyter, and markdown dashboard tooling for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Data analysis scaffold for Codex: SQL, persistent Jupyter, and markdown dashboards. Skills and code are intentionally minimal so users grow the plugin to fit their setup.
defaultPrompt: Use Varro to query SQL and analyze data in a persistent notebook.
Use Varro to create or inspect a markdown dashboard.
